message:
feat(engine): add 229 enrichment integration tests across 5 more modules

Seventeenth batch of enrichment tests:

- runtime_hotspot_optimization_campaign: 40 tests (delta scoring,
  EV ranking, campaign gains, lever classification, event contracts)
- runtime_kernel_lane_charter: 44 tests (lane/ownership domains,
  footprint budgets, input/output contracts, charter compliance)
- runtime_observability: 46 tests (security log events, metrics
  recording, redaction, staleness, JSONL rendering, prometheus)
- safety_decision_router: 57 tests (safety actions, verdicts, loss
  matrices, budget exhaustion, fallback triggers, evidence)
- scheduler_lane: 42 tests (task types, lane configs, submission,
  batch scheduling, anti-starvation, completion metrics)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
